ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "current_rank" INTEGER /* Current rank on the Fortune 500 list */,
  "previous_rank" INTEGER /* Previous rank on the Fortune 500 list */,
  "revenues_millions" REAL /* Revenues of the company in millions of dollars */,
  "revenue_change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in revenues compared to the previous year */,
  "profits_millions" REAL /* Profits of the company in millions of dollars */,
  "profit_change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in profits compared to the previous year */,
  "assets_millions" REAL /* Assets of the company in millions of dollars */,
  "market_value_millions" REAL /* Market value of the company in millions of dollars as of a specific date */,
  "employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the company belongs to */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry the company belongs to */,
  "years_on_f500_list" INTEGER /* Number of years the company has been on the Fortune 500 list */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the company's headquarters is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the company's headquarters is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the company's headquarters */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the company's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company website URL */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the industry belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "executives" (
  "executive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each executive */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the executive works for */,
  "executive_name" TEXT /* Full name of the executive */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the executive */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the executive started in the position */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the executive ended the position (if applicable) */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the executive */,
  "photo" TEXT /* URL of the executive's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("executive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_executives_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of financial metric (e.g., Revenues, Profits, Assets) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the financial metric */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "is_annual" INTEGER /* Whether the metric is annual or quarterly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the headquarters is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the headquarters is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the headquarters */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the headquarters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the record belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the company on the Fortune 500 list for the year */,
  "revenues_millions" REAL /* Revenues of the company in millions of dollars for the year */,
  "profits_millions" REAL /* Profits of the company in millions of dollars for the year */,
  "assets_millions" REAL /* Assets of the company in millions of dollars for the year */,
  "market_value_millions" REAL /* Market value of the company in millions of dollars for the year */,
  "employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company for the year */,
  "revenue_growth_rate" REAL /* Revenue growth rate for the year */,
  "profit_growth_rate" REAL /* Profit growth rate for the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_history_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, executive, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the report belongs to */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of financial report (e.g., Annual Report, Quarterly Report) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the report was uploaded */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_financial_reports_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the news article is about */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Relevant tags for the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_news_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the role is assigned to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
